---
format:
  revealjs:
    output-file: bnr_cvd_case_fatality_2023_v1_slides.html
    theme: simple
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    margin: 0.06
    slide-level: 2
    slide-number: c/t
    transition: fade
    controls: true
    progress: true
    center: false
    logo: ../../../../assets/images/uwi-crestonly-20p.png
    footer: "Barbados National Registry | The University of the West Indies"
    css:
      - ../../../../assets/css/reveal-fonts.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          :root {
            --bnr-navy: #001F3D;
            --bnr-teal: #045174;
            --bnr-sand: #D89C60;
            --bnr-orange: #E87A00;
            --bnr-grey: #5f6368;
            --stroke-purple: rgb(139, 111, 180);
            --heart-red: rgb(164, 22, 26);
          }

          .reveal {
            font-family: "BNR Sans", Arial, sans-serif;
            color: #222;
          }

          .reveal h1,
          .reveal h2,
          .reveal h3 {
            font-family: "BNR Sans", Arial, sans-serif;
            font-weight: 650;
            color: var(--bnr-navy);
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
          }

          .reveal h1 { font-size: 1.95em; }
          .reveal h2 { font-size: 1.45em; margin-bottom: 0.55em; }
          .reveal h3 { font-size: 1.05em; }

          .reveal p,
          .reveal li {
            font-size: 0.78em;
            line-height: 1.25;
          }

          .reveal ul {
            margin-top: 0.2em;
          }

          .title-wrap {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr;
            gap: 28px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-top: 70px;
          }

          .title-wrap img {
            width: 96px;
            height: auto;
          }

          .title-heading {
            font-family: "BNR Sans", Arial, sans-serif;
            font-size: 1.95em;
            font-weight: 650;
            color: var(--bnr-navy);
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            line-height: 1.1;
            margin: 0 0 0.35em 0;
          }

          .title-subtitle {
            font-size: 0.86em;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #222;
            margin-top: 0.15em;
          }

          .deck-kicker {
            color: var(--bnr-grey);
            font-size: 0.62em;
            margin-top: 0.9em;
          }

          .deck-rule {
            width: 100%;
            height: 4px;
            background: var(--bnr-sand);
            margin-top: 28px;
          }

          .large-number {
            font-size: 2.2em;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--bnr-navy);
            line-height: 1;
          }

          .label {
            color: var(--bnr-grey);
            font-size: 0.56em;
            line-height: 1.15;
            margin-top: 0.25em;
          }

          .number-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 28px;
            margin: 34px 0 20px 0;
          }

          .number-card {
            border-top: 5px solid var(--bnr-sand);
            background: #f7f7f7;
            padding: 20px 18px 18px 18px;
            min-height: 130px;
          }

          .insight-box {
            background: #f7f7f7;
            border-left: 7px solid var(--bnr-sand);
            padding: 20px 24px;
            margin-top: 22px;
          }

          .muted {
            color: var(--bnr-grey);
          }

          .stroke {
            color: var(--stroke-purple);
            font-weight: 700;
          }

          .heart {
            color: var(--heart-red);
            font-weight: 700;
          }

          .figure-title {
            font-size: 1.02em;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 0.55em;
          }

          .figure-note {
            font-size: 0.56em;
            color: var(--bnr-grey);
            margin-top: 0.4em;
          }

          .reveal .slide-logo {
            max-height: 54px !important;
          }

          .reveal section img {
            box-shadow: none;
            border: none;
          }

          .audience-citation {
            font-size: 0.82em;
            color: #222;
            line-height: 1.35;
            max-width: 1180px;
            margin-top: 0.8em;
          }

          .briefing-url-label {
            font-size: 0.72em;
            color: var(--bnr-grey);
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-top: 1.3em;
            margin-bottom: 0.25em;
          }

          .briefing-url {
            font-size: 0.82em;
            line-height: 1.25;
            color: var(--bnr-teal);
            font-weight: 700;
            word-break: break-word;
            max-width: 1180px;
          }

          .briefing-url a {
            color: var(--bnr-teal);
            text-decoration: underline;
            text-decoration-thickness: 0.08em;
            text-underline-offset: 0.12em;
          }
        </style>
---

## Title {.unlisted}

::: {.title-wrap}
![](../../../../assets/images/uwi-crestonly-20p.png)

::: {}
<div class="title-heading">CVD Case Fatality in Barbados</div>
<div class="title-subtitle">BNR CVD case-fatality briefing, 2023</div>
<div class="deck-kicker">Barbados National Registry | The University of the West Indies</div>
<div class="deck-kicker">Updated on 06 May 2026</div>
<div class="deck-rule"></div>
:::
:::

## Key messages

::: {.number-grid}
::: {.number-card}
<div class="label">Women | Stroke</div>
<div class="large-number">29%</div>
<div class="label">age-adjusted case fatality, 2022-2023</div>
:::

::: {.number-card}
<div class="label">Men | Stroke</div>
<div class="large-number">30%</div>
<div class="label">age-adjusted case fatality, 2022-2023</div>
:::

::: {.number-card}
<div class="label">Women | Heart attack</div>
<div class="large-number">16%</div>
<div class="label">age-adjusted case fatality, 2022-2023</div>
:::

::: {.number-card}
<div class="label">Men | Heart attack</div>
<div class="large-number">14%</div>
<div class="label">age-adjusted case fatality, 2022-2023</div>
:::
:::

::: {.insight-box}
Before age adjustment, women had higher case fatality than men for both conditions. Age explained part - but not all - of this gap.
:::

## Why case fatality matters

Case-fatality rates show what happens after patients reach hospital care.

- They describe the short-term consequences of cardiovascular events.
- They complement case counts and incidence rates.
- They help identify whether outcomes differ by event type, sex, and age.

::: {.insight-box}
Case fatality is not a measure of population risk. It is a measure of survival among people who had a hospital-registered event.
:::

## What we did

We reviewed hospital-registered stroke and heart attack events in Barbados and summarised case fatality by event type, sex, and age profile.

- We used two-year periods to stabilise the estimates.
- We compared crude, unadjusted modelled, and age-adjusted modelled probabilities.
- We examined whether the higher case fatality observed among women was explained by age.

## Higher case fatality in women after <span class="heart">heart attack</span> and <span class="stroke">stroke</span>

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="68%"}
![](../../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_case_fatality_2023_v1/figures/cvd_case_fatality_2023.png){fig-alt="Line chart showing case fatality after hospital-registered stroke and heart attack in Barbados by sex."}
:::

::: {.column width="32%"}
### Main pattern

- Stroke case fatality changed little over time.
- Heart attack case fatality fluctuated and showed some evidence of an upward trend.
- Before age adjustment, women had higher case fatality than men for both conditions.

::: {.figure-note}
Figure source: BNR hospital-registered stroke and heart attack events.
:::
:::
:::

## Interpretation

Women admitted with heart attack or stroke were, on average, older than men.

::: {.insight-box}
The older age profile among women explained part of the female excess in case fatality, but did not remove it completely.
:::

This means the observed difference should be interpreted as a signal for further review rather than as evidence of one single cause.

## Age profile and case fatality

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="68%"}
![](../../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_case_fatality_2023_v1/figures/cvd_case_fatality_age_group.png){fig-alt="Bar chart showing the age profile of hospital-registered stroke and heart attack events by sex and case-fatality status."}
:::

::: {.column width="32%"}
### Older age profile

- Women were more likely than men to be aged 70 or older at the time of their event.
- Women who died in hospital were also older on average.
- Age explained part - but not all - of the female excess in case fatality.

::: {.figure-note}
Age threshold: 70 years or older.
:::
:::
:::

## What this means

Case-fatality rates show how outcomes differ after patients reach hospital care.

The persistence of higher rates among women - only partly explained by their older age profile - highlights the need to understand whether differences in presentation, treatment, severity, comorbidity, or recovery may affect survival.

::: {.insight-box}
The practical next step is not to assume a single explanation, but to review the patient pathway from symptom onset through hospital treatment and discharge outcome.
:::

## Outputs and citation

Tables, figure data, metadata, and build records are available in the online briefing.

::: {.audience-citation}
Barbados National Registry. *CVD Case Fatality in Barbados: BNR CVD case-fatality briefing, 2023*. Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies. Accessed: [insert date accessed].
:::

::: {.briefing-url-label}
Online briefing
:::

::: {.briefing-url}
[https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/case-fatality.html](https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/case-fatality.html)
:::
